PyCon 2025

Annual Python Conference

Bringing together developers, data scientists, and enthusiasts for talks, workshops, and networking.

Register Now View Schedule

About PyCon 2025

PyCon is the premier annual gathering for the Python community. Whether you're a seasoned developer, a data scientist exploring new frontiers, or an enthusiast just starting your Python journey, PyCon 2025 offers something for everyone.

🎤 Keynote Talks

Learn from industry leaders and Python experts sharing insights on the latest trends and best practices.

🛠️ Hands-On Workshops

Participate in interactive workshops covering everything from web development to machine learning.

🤝 Networking

Connect with fellow Python enthusiasts, share experiences, and build lasting professional relationships.

📚 Learning Opportunities

Discover new libraries, frameworks, and techniques to enhance your Python development skills.

Schedule

Day 1: Keynotes & Workshops

Date: June 1, 2025

Opening keynote followed by parallel workshop tracks covering core Python topics.

Day 2: Technical Talks

Date: June 2, 2025

Deep-dive technical presentations on advanced Python concepts and real-world applications.

Day 3: Community & Closing

Date: June 3, 2025

Lightning talks, community discussions, and closing keynote with networking reception.

Venue

Convention Center

Location: Downtown Convention Center

Address: 123 Tech Boulevard, San Francisco, CA 94105

Parking: On-site parking available

Accessibility: Fully accessible venue with wheelchair access, accessible restrooms, and accommodations for attendees with disabilities.

📍 Map Coming Soon

Register for PyCon 2025

Join us for three days of learning, networking, and celebrating the Python community!

Early Bird

$199

  • ✓ All 3 days of conference
  • ✓ Access to all talks and workshops
  • ✓ Lunch and refreshments
  • ✓ Conference materials

Standard

$299

  • ✓ All 3 days of conference
  • ✓ Access to all talks and workshops
  • ✓ Lunch and refreshments
  • ✓ Conference materials
  • ✓ Networking dinner

Student

$99

  • ✓ All 3 days of conference
  • ✓ Access to all talks and workshops
  • ✓ Lunch and refreshments
  • ✓ Conference materials
